meaning: n.秒,片刻,第二者,第二人,助手,次货,二等品adj.另一个,又一个 num.第二vt.赞成,支持
examples: I flunked math in second grade.
He hung on to finish second.
They believe millions of them are passing through us every second without a trace.
Second, BAE's owners, as opposed to its board, aren't weeping about the collapse of the deal.
